data.body: sly-sloth-bay CLOSED+signed: joe-debug on the missing merge_change_409_guard event — root cause (event named in S2 plan but never emitted; guard fired silently at voter.py is_merge branch) proven via RED->GREEN with a mutation-checked held-out test (fires on merge, absent on non-merge). Landed via Gerrit change 247 (MERGED, fix on main 04440befd). NOTE: had to install mypy into the worktree venv (was missing, aborting the commit typecheck hook). NOTE: my JSON monitor broke on a control char in the LLM-Review comment — always parse Gerrit responses with json.loads(strict=False). Remaining epic 88ab work unchanged: S5 leafy-vogue-ingot (open, unblocked), S6 norm-dam-swab (open), spy-luge-wool (open bug).
